entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Welcome @NicoleTiffany - great to have you here. Please also join the Beginner Corner as you will find useful information there.

entry.title: add custom formula to cross-tab table
entry.content:
Hi

I'm using a cross-tab table and I can't figure out how to add a custom formula to create a percentage of total. I also can't get the overall total to show instead of the white diagonal line at the bottom of Sum. In the "% of Total" column I type "=" and it does nothing. It wont let me add anything to it. Screenshot attached. What am I doing wrong please?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: XML contains errors and cannot be processed
entry.content:
Dear Gary,
This error message is unfamiliar for us and might indicate an underlying XML generation issue. Therefore it would be beneficial to investigate it in your system. Would you please open an incident on component CA-GTF-CSC-EDO-DE?
Regards,
Uwe

entry.title: Re: ABAP list's column width are not uniform.
entry.content:
You didn't say what code you have used to generate this ABAP List (WRITE, ALV, etc.)

The shift may happen if you have full-width/double-byte characters (CJK East-Asian, etc.) You may have to use the class CL_ABAP_LIST_UTILITIES to calculate the output lengths, etc. (see its documentation).

entry.title: Re: CUSTOMER INVOICE FORM TEMPLATE
entry.content:
Dear,

I assume you want to remove the "/ 1 EACH" as you work with unit prices. Thus it is advised to rename your column to 'unit price' for clarity.

Default you get this:

- Column Net Price is filled up by the logic under Subform FrmPrice with its binding and scripting. It is the scripting that creates the concatenation of quantity / currency and base quantity with unit of measure. 

To adjust it and remove the base quantity with unit of measure you need to alter the scripting and remove the part in the concatenation (highlighted in red)

Scripting:

/ Concatenate the 'Net Price' value and currency if they are not initial
var content = "";

if (not this.decPrice.isNull)
then
content = Concat(content,this.decPrice.formattedValue);
if (not this.txtPriceCurrency.isNull)
then
content = Concat(content, " " , this.txtPriceCurrency.rawValue );
if ( not this.decBaseQuantity.isNull &
not this.txtBaseQuantityUnit.isNull )
then
content = Concat(content, " / " , this.decBaseQuantity.rawValue , " " , this.txtBaseQuantityUnit.rawValue);
endif
endif
endif
// Copy the concatenated value the visible field 'Net Price' of the table
if(content <> "")
then
FormInvoiceRequest.bdyMain.frmTableBlock.tblTable.rowItem.colPrice.rawValue = content;
endif

>>

Change the line in red to:

content = Concat(content);

That is an easy way to change it. But obviously you need to be certain that you do not have price definition other than unit pricing else you will show wrong pricing information.

KR,

Steve

entry.title: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate with the Jira to create a ticket/issue via SAP CPI to reduce the usage of the third part tool which does the same thing. 

I have referred the below blogs and tried to create a sample IFlow in the sap cpi but unfortunately, I am unable to proceed further due to the error encountered which states as below. 

The Jira Cloud platform REST API (atlassian.com)

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://<hostname>/rest/api/2/issue/ with statusCode: 415

FYI, I am able to get the details of the existing ticket but unable to create the ticket via CPI. But managed to create the ticket via POSTMAN.

Sample IFLow.

 

Payload used:

{
"fields": {
"project": {
"key": "SDC"
},
"summary": "Demo ticket from the CPI via API",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"description": "PLEASE IGNORE THIS ISSUE TICKET",
"assignee": {
"name": "Imran"
},
"labels": [
"Demo"
]
}
}

Please advice on this. Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content:
Small update from my side, in case anyone else stumbles onto the topic... it can be done.

Although the documentation of the credit memo request states that it can be extended with custom fields, those fields do not work everywhere. There still are areas in which you will not find them. Unfortunately for us, the EML TP object is one of those. Reached out to SAP, they've investigated and replied that it's currently not supported and we can use the customer influence program to raise the issue. Which we will do, but that does not help us at this time.

The way I was able to make the public API work from an on-stack piece of programming is to have two communication arrangements pointing to the same communication system (the S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition system), using the same communication user. I guess that previously when trying to find the correct interface, a connection through the same system could not be found.

I was so close, just a connection away. At last now I know what it was. I reckon once we get used to the way of working, it'll all become easier. And perhaps even make sense 😉

entry.title: Re: A Table Can Be Joined With a Maximum of one other table using Left Outer Join Error
entry.content: I'm not answering the question about ABAP 7.31, but in the future, you should develop first in ABAP 7.31, make it work, and it should work on ABAP 7.40, because like in many other programming languages, ABAP versions have ascending compatibility, not descending compatibility.

entry.title: Re: How to setup and configure SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:

I attempted to send an email using SAP Build Process Automation, but I encountered an error message stating: 'Email could not be sent due to an error on the SMTP server.'
As a result, I'm looking for alternative methods to send notifications within SAP Build Process Automation.
Are there other options available for sending notifications, and if so, could you provide some details on those alternatives?

entry.title: Re: Position workflow
entry.content:
Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions.

Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Position Workflow
entry.content:
Dear community experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can trigger WF when different changes are made on the position level.

We are currently facing a challenge because the WF is not getting triggered when on the Parent Position level changes are made. We added in the conditions the value: Position.Parent Position is not equal to OriginalValues.Parent Position , but was unsuccessful.

I would appreciate if you had some ideas on this challenge.

Best regards,

Eli

Michael

entry.title: epminsertedmember removal sap bpc
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have an input form that has Account in row axis & intercompany in column axis.

At the end of column axis, there is a Total member. However, this is epminsertedmember. Now I want to remove this epminsertedmember & replace with epmlocalmember. But when I remove the epminsertedmember & click on refresh, it reappears.

 

Can you please guide how to remove this member from the input form?

 

Thanks in advance.

Can anyone please help ?

entry.title: How to Implement Application Jobs which Automatically Update Sales Orders
entry.content:
If you use SAP S/4HANA Cloud and the Manage Sales Order - Version 2 app doesn't meet your specific needs for automatic updates, you can use extensibility to implement this function.

In this blog post, we explain how you can use application jobs. In our example, imagine you work in the sales department of a company. When a customer sends you a purchase order, it often includes a cancellation date. The cancellation date is the date by which you need to cancel the sales order if you haven't shipped the products to your customer yet. Thus, you would need a field in the sales order where you can enter this date, and an automated process to close any sales orders for which no products have been shipped by the cancellation date.

For this scenario, we create the following two custom fields in the Custom Fields app:

-YY1_CancellationDate_SDH: The field can be set when creating a sales order.

-YY1_ImmediateFollowUpR_SDH: The field will automatically be set if the cancellation date of a sales order is in the past and the sales order is not yet delivered.

In the details of these custom fields, do the following:

On the User Interfaces tab, enable the usage for the Manage Sales Orders – Version 2 app.

 

 

 

 

On the Analytics tab, enable the usage for the sales document and the sales order CDS views.

On the APIs tab, the field YY1_ImmediateFollowUpR_SDH needs to be enabled for I_SalesOrderTP.

To be able to use an application job, you need to implement a class in ABAP Development Tools (ADT). This class needs to implement the interfaces if_apj_rt_exec_object and  if_apj_dt_exec_object so that the application job catalog entry can identify it.

 

CLASS zcl_sd_sls_app_job DEFINITION
  PUBLIC FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_apj_dt_exec_object .
    INTERFACES if_apj_rt_exec_object .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_sd_sls_app_job IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_apj_dt_exec_object~get_parameters.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD if_apj_rt_exec_object~execute.
    DATA(lv_today) = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ).
    SELECT salesorder FROM i_salesorder WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS
      WHERE yy1_cancellationdate_sdh < @LV_today AND yy1_cancellationdate_sdh IS NOT INITIAL
        AND OverallDeliveryStatus <> 'C' AND OverallSDProcessStatus <> 'C'
          INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_salesorder).

    IF lt_salesorder IS NOT INITIAL.
      LOOP AT lt_salesorder REFERENCE INTO DATA(lv_salesorder).
        MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp
          ENTITY salesorder
          UPDATE FIELDS ( YY1_ImmediateFollowUpR_SDH )
          WITH VALUE #(
         ( %key     = VALUE #( salesorder      = lv_salesorder->SalesOrder )
            YY1_ImmediateFollowUpR_SDH = 'X'
          ) )
          FAILED   DATA(ls_modify_failed)
          REPORTED DATA(ls_modify_reported).

          if ls_modify_failed is INITIAL.
            COMMIT ENTITIES.
          else.
            " Error Handling
          endif.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

Create an application job catalog entry, and enter the class you just created.

Create an application job template for this application job catalog entry.

An IAM app will automatically be created in your package.

To use this IAM app, you create a new business catalog and assign the IAM app to the business catalog.

You can then find the new business catalog in the Business Catalogs app, using a business user that has a role based on the business role template SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR assigned to it, in client 100. Create a new business role, and assign the business catalog to this role.

Assign the new business role to your business user.

Log on to the Fiori launchpad with your business user, open the Application Jobs app, and schedule a job. Make sure that you select the job template that you just created.

You can define the recurrence pattern as you need it.

You can now test this function in the Manage Sales Order - Version 2 app. To do so, add the Cancellation Date and the Immediate Follow Up Required field to the UI using UI Runtime adaptation. Then, select a value in the past for the cancellation date, and wait until your scheduled job runs. The Immediate Follow Up Required field should be updated automatically when the job runs.

You can also use the application job to update other custom and standard fields in the app.

To learn more about application jobs in general, see this documentation.

Was this blog post helpful for you? Please share your ideas and feedback, they are very much appreciated for future blog posts.

entry.title: EC to S4 HANA replication
entry.content:
Hello All,

I need urgent help in EC to S4 HANA Replication.

We have a situation where EC is having different naming conversation exists for Object ids like A1-23030 and S4 HANA are only excepting numerical.

When I am trying to run report RH_SFIOM_PROC_ORG_STRUC_RPRQ, I am getting error in SLG1 as below:

FOJobFunction A1-23030: External ID from EC cannot be used as object ID in infotype 1000

Do someone had faced these scenarios before or anyone have any SAP standard solution for this.

Thank you a lot in advance,

Best Regards,

entry.content:

We have a requirement wherein input data will be coming from ServiceNow and I would like to use those input data to execute an ABAP report that does query on different tables depending on one of the input data. Can this be done via inbound PI proxy? Thank you.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Multi-parameter basic sum function (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: Task 3 submission

entry.title: GRAC_ERM_MASS_ROLE_UPD - question about Role Mass Update in GRC
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are rocking quite standard GRC solution, but our role development process is not so standard.
We are creating and changing all roles in the backends directly.

If we are creating a new role, then after deploying it into production we are importing this role to GRC via file upload. During this process we are getting all the authorization data from backend into GRC but this is one time. Every time the role changes, we don't get fresh data about current authorization objects.
Thanks to standard synchronization jobs GRC is aware of the change, but authorization data is not being pulled.

Tu update the Permissions tab we have to manually run Role Update webdynpro app:

Problem with this solution is that this is a manual work and the app can't really handle mass update.
App times out when more than about 2k roles are being selected for update.

Question:
We need an ABAP program that could be scheduled as a job and update all the roles from all of our backends weekly for example.
Do you know if such tool exists in standard GRC?

Best Regards,

Arno

Thanks

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error Happening in Monitoring - Requesting help!
entry.content: Hi , Ron_Hagan

entry.title: Demystifying Job Requisitions integrations with SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Our former colleague Anand (Andy) Athanur (@aathanur)  invested quite some time in demystifying the Recruiting OData API details to create Job Requisitions, Candidates, and Job Applications. This tremendous knowledge went into two Implementation Design principle Documents (IDPs), the go-to guides for all partners who want to extend our SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting solution with their use cases.

I want to highlight three essential aspects from the first IDP about Job Requisitions, which often create surprises for partners who consume our APIs to build their extension solutions. Those should answer typical questions like

  1. Why does the data created look different within the UI than what I put into the API? – Side effects caused by business rules and other logic
  2. Why do I get an error message when calling the API when it worked before? –  Data Model Changes
  3. Why can't I read/write appropriate business data via APIs? – Permission handling and route maps for APIs in Recruiting

Like other SAP SuccessFactors APIs, Recruiting APIs also trigger additional logic and business rules. Hence, the data created by the Job Requisition API might not always look the same as the API request you provided. Business rules are a flexible option for defining logic to change field values based on input from other fields. There are default rules for Job Requisitions, such as DefaultValues_JobReq (see screenshot below). This rule sets the Company, Division, Department, and Location field from the hiring manager in the Job Requisition. API calls trigger those rules in a similar way as edits in the UI would do. If you are surprised by the data created by the API call, it might be worth checking for the corresponding rule execution and Chapter 5 of the IDP.

The Recruiting data model is based on Job Requisitions, Candidates, and Job Application templates. They define the available fields, their types, and other semantics, such as mandatory fields. Changes to the data model are reflected in the corresponding APIs as well. As a result, it is crucial to understand that incompatible changes to the data model after a recruiting implementation is already live and integrations are deployed and running can cause unwanted problems. While changing a field from mandatory to not mandatory usually does not create any issues as it relaxes the conditions for consistent data, the opposite change, making a field required, usually creates problems. Integrations that do not provide those fields are starting to fail and would need adjustments. The same applies to data type changes or fields' removal. The IDP talks about how to refresh the API metadata after such data model changes in chapter 5.1.4, view the API metadata in the data dictionary, and finally, change a field in the template definition to not mandatory in chapter 5.2.2.

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting has, besides the standard permission model and settings based on Roles Based Permissions (RBP), its own permission or workflow-like concept that is based on route maps. In case technical users are used to change the recruiting data instead of the users of the employees, both the RBP permission model and the route map for the technical API user must be defined to allow the operations. As such, the permission needed, e.g., to read MDF objects like legal entity, cost center, etc., and the correct setup to allow routing the Job Requisition must be configured.

Chapter 5.2.7 talks about the needed configuration to allow a technical API user to change the routing of the Job Requisition and give the control back to the initial processor afterward.

The IDP SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting: Guide to Leveraging Job Requisition OData APIs has screenshots and API examples of all the scenarios mentioned above. They will help you understand how to perform operations that are visible in the screenshots of the UI in the corresponding OData APIs. This is why we did not repeat those API examples here and guide you to this document.

If you want to know more about how to handle candidates and job applications, check this blog from my colleague Anoop Garg (@anoop20), who introduced this topic and the corresponding IDP there.

entry.title: Re: Non-Deductible VAT Code and Freight in Purchase Invoice
entry.content:
Hi @Felipe_Lima,

Thanks for your reply.

This is a good workaround and I have suggested it to the client, so the correct allocation of the VAT quota is made.
However, the possibility of using freight with this type of tax code should be available and should be corrected, at which point it may be a case of opening an incident at SAP.

Kind regards,

Federico

entry.title: Re: ABAP list's column width are not uniform.
entry.content: Does the formatting affects the column width? Example this is the formatting of the output X_65_80

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q3 2024
entry.content:
Hi Heidi @Heidi_G_P ,

BW queries will be opened in Data Analyzer, Insights are not supported. Future versions of the RRI feature in SAC may offer BADI support (https://me.sap.com/notes/3484564).

However, the jump from a story to an insight would be covered by the influence item you mentioned and probably not via RRI.

Best regards,

Arno

entry.title: Re: Elevating Value and Adoption with SAP Signavio solutions
entry.content:
Hello @Victor_Perez 

is this the first blog of a small series of upcoming Blogs, or what is the purpose here?

I would have loved to get some real insights into the findings and solutions of the different analyzed systems... some "highlight" process KPIs, the root cause, the improvements, the benefits.

The description is quite abstract here ... or is everything still going on?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Should production storage location be WM managed ?
entry.content:
Hi folks.

In my company we have one site that is the warehouse for raw material with a storage location linked to WM, and a second site which belong to the production, with several storages locations which are only MM-IM managed. We stage the materials from warehouse to production with the WM-PP interface, everything works as expected.

Recently, they asked to implement WM to the second site (Production). I don't have enough hindsight to know the real impact of this demand, is it a good practice to link a production storage location to WM ? Or maybe is it better to keep the storage location IM managed and just implement WM in the second site with a new storage location, which is reserved for stockage activities on this site?

I did some researches, it seems that certains companies have their production WM managed, but I'm not sure if it's common practice. My fear is to complicate the production process unnecessarily with the WM layer...

If any of you have some guidances, I'd really appreciate it, thanks !

entry.title: Re: PFAL HR Master Data Distribution - 5-031 no data to b...

entry.title: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - please help
entry.content:
I have created a BPA  with 3 inputs

I am in the Editable version and tested the Automation, it was completed successfully, and after that released and  Deployed the Process, now what I wanted is, I want to pass the JSON payload using POSTMAN but that is creating error 

 

Error message: The activity 'automation_getCreatedJobStatus_1' cannot be started since the input is not correct: [[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/0/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/1/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/2/JobCount] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.],[[/INPUT_JOBS/TABLES/JOB_LIST/3/Job Count] The value must be of string type, but actual type is integer.]
Log ID:6888f174-b33b-4a02-b706-be6956b-us10

(screenshot attached below)

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build SAP Business Workflow SAP Business Process Automation by Redwood@Ron_Hagan

entry.title: How to enable realtime delta load in SAP Datasphere for SAPI datasources
entry.content:
I’m interested in real-time delta load. But I found out that the KBA is not available.

SAP Datasphere
Best Practices and Troubleshooting

Connectivity & Data Integration
3264491 - How to enable realtime delta load in SAP Datasphere for SAPI datasources

You are not entitled for SAP Note/KBA 3264491

entry.title: Re: SAP BW: IO won't activate afte removing navigation at...

the dump looks like it is caused by any transformation?

Would it be possible to delete the transformations in and out and trying to activate again.

Or would this affect your delta loads?

I have no other idea at the moment.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Query for which sales order lines has the discount or price been adjusted
entry.content:
Hello @jeroenw.

I have no clue about Business One, but if you have also tables like CDHDR and CDPOS I would first check here if those changes can be found at all.

If yes, then you could work with those records. Otherwise... no idea 😉

BR, Martin

entry.title: SAP Code Jam in Belgium (Gent Region) - RAP
entry.content:
Dear CodeJam Team,

We are a SAP Partner interested in organizing a code jam focused on Introduction to the ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model to the customer and would like to request your support in making this event a success.

We experienced that the SAP CodeJam events provide a great opportunity for us developers and our customers developers to learn and develop our skills in multiple technologies, while also connecting with each other and sharing ideas.

As our previous 2 code jams with SAP were a success, we would appreciate your assistance in organizing this event, as well as connecting us with a SAP expert who can lead the CodeJam session.

We propose hosting the event on 16, 29 or 30 October 2024 at our Gent office, with an estimated number of participants of 25. Other date options can also be discussed.

Thank you for your time and consideration. We look forward to the opportunity to work with you in organizing again a successful CodeJam event.

Sincerely,
Jasper Debie

entry.title: Extracting more than 5000 records from SE16/SE16N.
entry.content:
Hi,

We are on S4 Hana 2023, and I am unable to export more than 5000 records from any table.  The table (for example is KNB1), has been restricted only to return Customer/Company Code/ Payment terms.  When I run I get 96,364 records.  My maximum number of hits is 239,234

Next -> Goto -> Export -> spreadsheet.  File opens in Excel, but when I review, I only get 5000 records.

Can someone advise how I can change the maximum number of records to be exported please?  

Thanks in advance

Jackie

entry.title: Re: Displaying Only Total Figures for Cost Elements in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hello @RajuRao.

I have no idea what you mean with "1 to 9 series of cost elements", but can't you use a dimension, add a new property and then display the values according to the property only?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Elevating Value and Adoption with SAP Signavio solutions
entry.content:
Hi @MKreitlein ,

Thank you for your interest and thoughtful feedback! This hands-on challenge with Signavio customers has already been finalized. It is now structured to provide ongoing support and continuous improvement, and we are actively working with participants to uncover and implement solutions.

We invite you to learn more about using SAP Signavio solutions to drive value in your organization. Stay tuned for more news!

Best regards,

Victor

entry.title: Re: SAP BW: IO won't activate afte removing navigation at...
entry.content:
According the dump, your system has 7.50 SP16. Please install the notes:

2854929
2881086
2886513

and then check if you can open and activate the TRFN 00N0PM69FHQYY5KQ97W0BJRMOR6TZUPE (for which the dump is raised).

entry.title: Re: WM HU Printing on different GR AREA
entry.content:
Hi @Eric_SAUTOT ,

it is not really the idea to have multiple physical warehouses assigned to the same 4-digit warehouse number. Of course customers are free to set up their warehouse structure as they like and I also understand that there may be good reasons to do this (e.g. it is only about very small satellite, no delivery papers are required and you just want to move stock there with a warehouse task instead of running a full STO process) but then you must also consider the consequence of this design decision that some of the available configurations and settings might not work as well for you because they are designed to have the warehouse number as a key field to e.g. differentiate where to print.

In your specific case I would have expected that if it is different physical warehouses and still you decided to use the same warehouse number, then at least you would create different goods-receipt zone storage bins to have transparency in the system of the physical location of the stock. Perhaps you could elaborate a bit more why you decided against different goods-receipt zone storage bins or what other kind of information you are currently entering in the system to make transparent which stock is in which warehouse. After all, the system will need some indicator to determine where to print.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: WM HU Printing on different GR AREA
entry.content:
One more comment: Please post your questions on S/4HANA Public Cloud here for future questions:

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition Supply Chain Q&A | SAP Community

entry.title: MyInbox tasks count error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
I have an issue on MyInbox count tasks on Launchpad tile.

With browser console I see that this call service get an 500 error:

<host>/dynamic_dest/workflowService/TaskCollection/$count/?$filter=Status eq 'READY' or Status eq 'RESERVED' or Status eq 'IN_PROGRESS' or Status eq 'EXECUTED'&sap-language=IT
 
What I can do to solve?
 
MyInbox App is a copy of standard as described here.
 
Best Regards,
Giampaolo

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Process Automation

Arpit Khanna

entry.title: Re: SAPSetVariable Does Not Work
entry.content:
Hello @Kemaley 

first of all, you should always give the AO version, you are currently using. I chose this link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_ANALYSIS_OFFICE/ca9c58444d64420d99d6c136a3207632/f2713ef16c9b1014bf2c9a7eb0e91070.html?locale=en-US&version=2.8.19.0 

... and you can see that there is one additional parameter, which might be helpful:

  • Text - Single member as text.
  • Key - Single member as key.
  • INTERNAL_KEY - Single member with its internal key.
  • INPUT_STRING - Complex selection of members.
  • INPUT_STRING_AS_ARRAY - Returns the input string as string as array.
  • LITERAL - Single member with its internal key.

Maybe you try this again:

lResult= Application.Run("SAPSetVariable", "OP_DATE_OPEN", "08.07.2024", "KEY", "DS_1")

or the INTERNAL_KEY, which should be 20240708

BR, Martin

entry.title: Change Customer Reference on Item level in Preliminary Billing Document
entry.content:
Hi SAP, 

is there an option to change Customer Reference on Item level in Preliminary Billing Document?

I know this is possible on Header Level but not on Item level. 

The customer wants to avoid changing this in the Sales Order of the project as this is really time consuming. 

BR, 

Sorosch

entry.title: Re: UI does not refresh on delete of instance through cus...
entry.content:
Hi Mio, I was able to refresh the list but now have a new issue. Here is the case - I am deleting an instance based on condition when user click action button. And have used side effects in annotation file to refresh the list. The list is refreshed successfully. But problem occurs when I open the object page and come back and try to use action button. It deletes the instance but it also throws an error message. It is trying to find the deleted instance it seems. PFA.

It is trying to put GET call on the deleted item here. 

Br,

Shahab

entry.title: Subject: Understanding and Optimizing OTHER_DYNAMIC Heap Memory Usage in SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently studying the Heap_Memory_Used_Size of M_SERVICE_MEMORY (the dynamic part of memory in HANA) and looking for ways to optimize memory usage.

I have identified three key components:

  1. Memory used by procedures: This information is available in the view M_ACTIVE_STATEMENTS.
  2. Memory used by temporary tables: This is found in the view M_TEMPORARY_TABLES.
  3. Memory used by physical tables: This is found in the view M_CS_TABLES.

However, there is a part of heap memory labeled i call other_dynamic (all heap memory -Statement_memory -Temporary_tabeles - physical_tables)  that I do not fully understand. This memory allocation exists even when there is no activity in the database, and its value increases after a commit.

My questions are:

  1. What specifically consumes the OTHER_DYNAMIC portion of heap memory in SAP HANA?
  2. How can I optimize my database to reduce the memory consumed under OTHER_DYNAMIC?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: OVP: Pie Chart Values rounding
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question. Can I adjust the rounding of the values in a pie chart?

In my example, I have the value 1 million. However, this is actually 1.4 million (picture). So we wouldn't like to embezzle 400k. Because you can only see the exact value when you hover. But not every customer hover everything.

regards,

Lars

How to solve it, thank you

entry.title: Is there any way skip Sap login for MDK app?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently developing an application using the SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK). The application is intended for customers who do not have SAP IDs. Therefore, the usual SAP login process is not applicable in this case.

I’m looking for a way to bypass or skip the SAP login for the MDK app entirely. This is not just for development or testing purposes, but also for the actual usage of the app by our customers who do not have SAP IDs.

Is there a setting, configuration, or perhaps a different authentication method that can be used to accommodate this requirement?

Any help or guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: cost component structure split in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, please advise whether cost component structure split can be done to have a visibility of the cost drilled down at multiple parameters.

For Example, we need to capture the cost related to Power & Fuel, Dies & fixtures amortization. in this case, please advise whether cost component structure can be splitted to take care of this in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

We're unable to get the cost split & visibility (Please refer below screenshot in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud - Fiori app : Display Material Cost Estimate)

Please advise.

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Leverage Data Export Service to View Currency Table Data
entry.content: @shivampurwar , I think what @JefB means is that valid from date is what decides the Fx being used for translation. So if a valid from date is 01-03-2024 for a currency in the table this rate will apply till any next next valid from date is provided so the same Fx could be getting applied for April , may June and so on. In the model where this Fx will be loaded will just have one record for march. Now if somebody wants to show a report where  they want to show what Fx rate was used for Translation in June, they don't know for sure what month to look for from the rate model ( in this case its rate from march month)

entry.title: Re: Error FINS_CREDIT_MIG000 during 'Reconcile Documented Credit Decision' in Migration
entry.content: Any solution about this error?

entry.title: Null values handling using LINK function in data actions in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing the issue with Null values while writing the logic in data actions. Here is the scenario. I have two Models. Model A, has units and sales as account. Model B, has additional sales and commission % as account. The data is written in Model B by reading the values from Model A and writing an additional calculation.

 Calculation:

IF Units = 0 or NULL then

Total Sales(model B) = Sales(model A) * Commission % (model B)

Else

Total Sales(model B) = Sales(model A) + Additional Sales(model B)

Please refer below screenshot.

I'm writing the same logic but no result is generated  for Sept and Oct as they have null values. This is what I'm writing this code in data action. I'm using the correct syntax for LINK,DATA and RESULTLOOKUP statement in the below code and this pseudo code is for reference.

IF LINK(Units(model A) > 0 then

DATA(Total Sales(model B)) = RESULTLOOKUP(Sales(model A)) + RESULTLOOKUP(Additional Sales(model B))

Else

DATA(Total Sales(model B)) = RESULTLOOKUP(Sales(model A) ) * RESULTLOOKUP(Commission % (model B))

 

Anyone who has faced this similar kind of issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks.

I have created a business rule to automatically set the Employee ID in the Emplid field in the Biographical portlet upon hiring, but the Employee ID in the Live Profile is still showing no data/value. Thank you

entry.title: Re: Access to HANA Cloud DB directly from SAP Build Autom...
entry.content: As I know, iRPA does not provide direct JDBC libraries to access HANA Cloud DB. The possible way to interact with HANA Cloud DB is through APIs.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: Replicating SuccessFactors Entities to SAP HANA Cloud...
entry.content: You can explore the SAP API Business Hub for standard integration packages for various use cases, including data replication from SuccessFactors to SAP HANA Cloud. The SAP Cloud Platform Integration Suite is to use to configure and deploy the iFlows, connect to various systems, and transform and map data. The Data Synchronization - schedule iFlows to run regularly and use delta replication for up-to-date data. Depending on your needs, you may need to use other SAP BTP services, like SAP HANA Cloud Integration for data services.

entry.title: Re: Requirement date of components in production order re...
entry.content: The requirement date of a component is determined by the operation to which it is assigned. If a component is assigned to operation 0200, its requirement date will be based on the scheduling of operation 0200.

entry.title: Re: Non-Deductible VAT Code and Freight in Purchase Invoice
entry.content:
Hi @FedericoS ,

Actually, that is not a workaround, it's just a different way to work with freight in documents.

You could do the same by using the header (footer) allocation, but I personally go with the line method when the scenario is specific like yours, and/or the freight distribution method available does not meet my needs (or sometimes not even set up).

You may have a look at the documentation Freight - Setup Window | SAP Help Portal

KR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: How to access Hanan Spatial Service (HSS) APIs from o...
entry.content:
The error message you're seeing suggests that the connection to the HSS service is being refused. This could be due to a number of reasons, including incorrect proxy settings, a firewall blocking requests, or the service not running on the server.
You should ensure that the HSS service is up and running in the subaccount where it was created and make sure that the service key you're using to access the HSS service is correct and has the necessary permissions.

Check your network settings to ensure that there are no firewalls or proxies blocking the connection to the HSS service. If you're using a proxy, make sure that it's configured correctly. If you're trying to access the HSS service from a different subaccount, you might need to configure cross-account access. This usually involves setting up trust relationships between the two subaccounts.

Ensure that your Business Application Studio (BAS) is correctly configured to access the HSS service. This might involve setting up environment variables or adjusting the BAS settings and make sure that you're using the HSS APIs correctly. Check the API documentation and ensure that your requests are properly formatted and include the necessary headers and parameters.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW: IO won't activate afte removing navigation at...
entry.content: I get no errors when activating that transformation (no notes implemented yet.)

entry.title: Re: xsjob including a table function
entry.content: As I know, you can create an XS job that includes a table function in SAP HANA. However, you cannot directly call a table function in an XS job. Instead, you can create a stored procedure that calls the table function and then call this stored procedure in your XS job.

entry.title: Re: Deploying App using ABAP CDS Annotations
entry.content: @nicknf Which environment are you using, S/4HANA On-Premise or BTP ABAP environment?

entry.title: Re: How to add a new Entity & navigation property to standard cds: A_PurchaseContract?
entry.content: Can anyone has solution for this issue please?

entry.title: Re: Getting '403' error accessing S/4 Public Cloud ODATA
entry.content:
The HTTP 403 error indicates the server understands the request but won't authorize it, requiring client authentication.

Check and verify the user has necessary roles and authorizations in the Maintain Business Users app. Ensure it's correctly set up, active, and using the right communication scenario and confirm the OData service is activated in the Manage Communication Users app. Check credentials and endpoint URL in the CPI OData V2 adapter and consult your network team for possible restrictions.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Best Practices Packages with SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Dear Paul,

I would like to know what extension formats are possible with SAP Signavio. Is it possible to export a format in excel format?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Procedure cached plans not reused for new connection
entry.content:
Hi Pieter,

Re: "Every new database connection does not reuse this cached plan, an new plan is always created. After that, all the other existing database connections are using this new cached plan".

If you think the problem is due to the query plan, check if the new database connection is using sp_recompile before executing the sp. If yes a new query plan will be generated and then the existing connections(trying to execute the sp as part of the code not having sp_recompile)will make use of the existing plan.

If you think the problem is execution time but the existing plan being used, check your cache (default data/user defined cache) is configured properly or not and the other one to concentrate is that any temporary tables (#) that are needed by the new database connection to execute the sp are present or not.

Regards,
Dilip Voora

entry.title: Decommission of Candidate Tags in RCM
entry.content:
Hi ,

As we know from 1H 2024 release onwards the candidate tags have been deprecated in recruiting I would like to know what is the possible work around that is suggested in the new candidate work bench?

entry.title: Demystifying Candidate Applications Integrations with SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting is one of such favourite topics which garner much attention from our implementation partners as well as large number of software partners too while extending the core ATS functionality to address variety of business needs from our customers.

With this blog, we would be primarily demystifying the relevant OData APIs which has been described in much more depth here with an IDP document and enabling our partners to overcome any candidate sourcing and job application related challenges during their development journey for solution extension capabilities.

Overview

With any typical solution extension, a candidate could be created into the system either via Candidate or CandidateLight endpoints which still triggers automated email notifications with a link to reset the password at the candidate email address. Candidate Light works in a much simpler manner and works with minimal set of four fields (country, firstName, lastName and primaryEmail) itself.

However, Candidate entity varies based upon settings in the tenant. Here, are the default required fields with a demo tenant but do also note the system mandatory field 'country' type Picklist as well to make integrations work.

Do note, these endpoints don't support deletion of any data and this should be managed directly by Data Retention and Purge Management.

And, for more details around the extended attributes like education, work experience, certifications etc. and various other business use cases like automating employee referrals, forwarding candidates including the handling of  bulk operations - do refer the comprehensive information provided with section 5.2 & 5.3 of the IDP - Guide to Leveraging Candidate and Job Application OData APIs  here.

Apart from candidate, creating job applications via APIs is one of the most complex operations considering the dependcies upon various other entities. So, it's pertinent to understand the logical relationships with all those entities and here is the simple representation of the same.

There are multiple hidden secrets around handling of data privacy consent statements, qualifying questions, rating scales and cascading questions, managing interviews etc. As an example, there are no APIs available to either query or update the DPCS and so it becomes the responsibility of the partner to manage DPCS for candidates. The JobApplication API does not validate if the candidate has accepted the DPCS or not. From an API perspective, the Candidate entity must be updated by setting the 'agreeToPrivacyStatement' property to either 'true' or 'false'. It's important to note such property values can't have other similarly sounding values like 'Yes' or 'No' and using any of such other combination values basically means candidate hasn't accepted the DPCS and candidate profile would be marked for anonymization. And, hence no longer can be actioned or available in search results.

So, if you are curious to know more about other business scenarios and have a holistic view around everything related to recruiting integrations, do have a look at the comprehensive content published at the community page for sample API requests corresponding to those varied use-cases.

In case you would like to know more about handling of Job Requisition integrations, please do refer the blog from my colleague @gerald_reinhard who introduced this topic along with related IDP document.

Special thanks to @aathanur  who had shared his wealth of experience along with other contributors who authored these documents last year while bringing them to the life for eco-system. 

References -

IDP - Guide to Leveraging Candidate and Job Application OData APIs

IDP - Guide to Leveraging Job Requisition OData APIs

entry.title: Follow-on doc. is inconsistent. Quotation for RFQ 7000000008 couldn't be created.

entry.title: RAP: Default Value (managed with draft)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

What is the current best practice for specifying default values when creating an Object?

In my scenario, I have a managed RAP application with Draft. What I don't mean is giving default values about the possibility of a "determination ... with on save { create; }".

The values should already be in the editable input field when the object page is called up via the Create button.

Operation Defaulting is not an option on OnPrem. I don't think this option is available there yet.

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: Using building block inside fragment fails in Fiori E...
entry.content:
Hi @Harshi ,

the extensionAPI is available through this inside the Custom Page controller:

this.getInterface().getExtensionAPI()

With that you can call the loadFragment function (this.getInterface().getExtensionAPI().loadFragment(...)).

This should solve the issue imho. I didn't try it yet, since I went for another approach (freestyle fragment without building blocks).

Hope that helps
Daniel

entry.title: Re: Output Parameter Determination: Default email recipients
entry.content: This link is broken. Can you please check and send again?

entry.title: Re: XBRL Mapper or Template Tool
entry.content:
@Eyal_Feiler , thank you for clarification, the distinction between regulators wasn't evident to me before.
In this case there's no officially supported and recommended scenario, and you can check what fits best based on your own understanding of the reporting standard. 
Template method is generally used when the reporting format is strict (table-like data input forms) and no new elements are allowed in the taxonomy, while mapping method is used with extended taxonomies and when tags are added on top of an existing financial report with tables and narratives.
